title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Cuemath - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Cuemath - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cuemath, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cuemath:
Cuemath is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath!
